phase: RIC-2d: guard.ts:820 migrated to @alembic/core/guard frameworkAgnostic; core/enhancement demoted to a count-capped infra+test exception (zero business consumers)
referenceLimitsNote: Limits are TRUE from-line/grep counts (multi-line import forms included), recalibrated 2026-06-12 so the Core scanner multi-line regex fix (CO1-SCANNER-MULTILINE-BLIND-SPOT) can land without turning this gate red. Shrink-only.

@alembic/core/infrastructure/database/dr.reason: No stable facade exports the drizzle singleton lifecycle (initDrizzle/getDrizzle/resetDrizzle). @alembic/core/database wires the singleton via DatabaseConnection.connect(), cannot open :memory: fixtures, and redirects excluded projects to a shared tmp DB, so it is not a semantics-preserving target for isolated test fixtures.
@alembic/core/infrastructure/database/dr.removalTrigger: Core ships a stable test/fixture facade (in-memory migrated DB + DrizzleDB without global singleton mutation); route via the IC/AD export-surface wave.

@alembic/core/infrastructure/database/dr.reason: No stable facade exports the drizzle schema tables (auditLogs).
@alembic/core/infrastructure/database/dr.removalTrigger: Core promotes schema table exports onto a stable facade, or an AuditStore DI wave removes the singleton fallback.

@alembic/core/infrastructure/database/mi.reason: Isolated :memory: fixtures need callable migration modules; openAlembicDatabase cannot target :memory: and mutates the global drizzle singleton. Hand-copied DDL (Alembic Train B shape) was rejected for the 40+ column knowledge_entries table after Alembic needed drift coordination (Alembic f5ff9e1) for a far smaller copy.
@alembic/core/infrastructure/database/mi.removalTrigger: Same stable test/fixture facade as the drizzle row.
Same stable test/fixture facade as the drizzle row.

consumers: dynamic import() lazy loading of optional language grammars
@alembic/core/core/ast/lang-*.reason: Deliberate lazy loading of optional grammar parsers; no stable lazy-grammar facade exists. Mirrors the Alembic kept rows with identical true counts.
@alembic/core/core/ast/lang-*.removalTrigger: Core ships a stable lazy language-parser facade.

@alembic/core/core/enhancement.reason: RIC-2d: zero BUSINESS consumers remain — guard.ts:820 and http/routes/guard.ts now read Guard rules via the high-level @alembic/core/guard facade (resolveEnhancementGuardRules). The only direct core/enhancement imports left are bootstrap/DI infra wiring (R3) and real-pack integration tests (§B/R4). Count-capped at 5 (shrink-only) so no new direct business consumer can be added silently.
@alembic/core/core/enhancement.removalTrigger: Core ships a high-level initCoreEnhancements()/registry facade for the infra init (R3 optional follow-up) + a Core enhancement test fixture for the integration tests (§B).
